category_sources: source_facts.description says it computes size metrics for a Git repository; official GitHub README describes outputting repository size statistics and flags problematic metrics.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is git-sizer; official repository title is github/git-sizer.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README includes installation, getting started, usage, options, concepts, and reference material.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo enrichment intentionally left null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify a Git CLI that computes repository size metrics.
